entry.title: SAP ICC 25 years celebration - SAP ICC EMEA Journey
entry.content:
SAP established SAP Integration and Certification Center (SAP ICC) 25 years ago to certify the integration of partners’ solutions with SAP's end-to-end suite of applications and services. This provides SAP customers with confidence that the solutions they purchase will integrate seamlessly with SAP technology.

 


Our partner ecosystem plays a vital role in extending the SAP portfolio to meet the existing demands and future requirements. Our customers depend on high-quality deployments and integration of partner solutions for a smooth flow of business data between SAP solutions and the partner applications.

 

To support SAP’s vision and to meet customer success, SAP ICC has introduced hundreds of certification scenarios to quickly adapt to the changing technologies across the SAP product portfolio. Our mandate is to keep in line with the SAP vision and ensure that our partners stay relevant to customers. Our focus is to facilitate seamless integration, reduce the implementation time, and lower the integration costs to achieve compatibility with the infrastructure of customers. To earn the “SAP Certified” designation, partners must put their solution’s SAP integration through stringent qualification procedures.

 

Since its inception in 1972, SAP has always been in the forefront of enterprise technology and pioneering the market with business processes. During SAP’s last five decades of market leadership, it evolved from mainframes via UNIX systems and the start of the internet to digital transformation. History records the contribution of SAP in the Business processes transformation.  Business process is now completely changed through highly advanced technologies like blockchain, Internet of Things, big data, machine learning, and so on.

 

Today, SAP is a market share leader in enterprise resource planning (ERP), analytics, supply chain management, human capital management, master data management, data integration as well as in experience management. SAP is a Recognized database leader. SAP's Broadest portfolio of modular and suite solutions is available on-premise, in the cloud, and hybrid.

  • SAP customers generate 87% of total global commerce ($46 trillion)

  • 94% of the world’s 500 largest companies are SAP customers

  • 99 of the 100 largest companies in the world are SAP S/4HANA customers


Source: https://www.sap.com/documents/2017/04/4666ecdd-b67c-0010-82c7-eda71af511fa.html

SAP’s 2021 results show acceleration in new cloud business across its entire cloud portfolio, including SAP Qualtrics, SAP Human Experience Management, SAP Ariba Procurement, SAP Customer Experience, SAP Business Technology Platform. SAP often refreshes its strategy to advance its leadership position in the market. It is amazing to see how quickly partners also adopt their own strategies to provide better service to the customers. The migration of partner solutions from SAP ERP to SAP S/4HANA is a clear example of the trust our partners have in SAP.  So far, we have more than 250 partners certifying 500 solutions across EMEA (Europe, Middle East, and Africa) embracing SAP S/4HANA and our cloud portfolio.

 

The EMEA region has always been a huge market for SAP and our partners. The largest share of SAP's revenues is generated in EMEA, closely followed by the Americas. SAP ICC in EMEA has seen continuous growth since its inception. The last decade shows a four-fold growth in the number of yearly certifications.

 

Although the certification is valid for up to 3 years, the recurring interest from our partners to recertify their solutions and add new certifications is a clear indication of huge customer satisfaction and adoption, leading to their own success.

 

“For development and quality perspective it is of vital importance to deliver a software product that perfectly fits our customers SAP landscape including software deployment, compatibility, and standard applications. Certifying software with SAP ICC means highest quality and support when customer install and run our partner software product in their SAP Infrastructure” - Dr. Torsten Fenske, Co-Founder XFT GMBH, Germany - certifying their add-ons with SAP ICC since 2004

Hear more from our partners:



 

Culture and language play an equally important role. Many times, localization of software is required to address the needs of the country, culture, and language. SAP ICC has certification centers and scenarios for the localization requirements. Our offices in EMEA are present in Germany, Russia, UAE, and South Africa. Our partner recruitment team in EMEA understands the software business and the region well. For example, the solutions may have to cater to the more than 200 languages spoken in Europe.

 

“Even though SAP ICC interacts with hundreds of partners each year, the regional presence allows us a personal touch and good rapport often over a long period of engagement with our partners. To cover the multiple time zones, cultures, and languages, where our partners and ISVs are located, SAP ICC established a strong regional presence.  Each location is composed of integration experts with expertise across the diverse portfolio of SAP solutions to drive joint certification projects with partners and ISVs.  -  Imran Khan, Vice president SAP Integration and Certification Center

 

SAP ICC’s contribution towards partner success extends beyond the seamless integration for customers. It gives partners a unique opportunity to establish a strong brand association with SAP. This becomes a key differentiator from their competition. They display their SAP certification logo with pride and in full confidence that it impacts positively in tenders, which helps accelerate their sales cycle. In the words of one of our certified partners,

 

“The certificate gives confidence and certainty to our prospective clients regarding our technology, security, and connectivity. Certification with SAP ICC increases the sales by shortening the sales cycle by 50%. After our first re-certification, we landed on a deal with AOK, the biggest deal in SAP store” - Andreas Mors, Head of Project Management, SYNCPILOT based in Munich, Germany

 

There are multiple such success stories to share why partners in EMEA join our certification program. In our 25 years of service to both partners and customers, our foundation is built on trust. Everything falls in place when we achieve it together.



To follow SAP Integration and Certification Center tag in SAP Community: https://answers.sap.com/tags/539667611584404255845040674498708

If you have any questions about the topic, please use the following link: https://answers.sap.com/questions/ask.html?primaryTagId=539667611584404255845040674498708

entry.title: Get Certified: C_ACTIVATE | SAP Certified Associate - SAP Activate Project Manager
entry.content:
In this blog post you will find an overview with relevant resources about how to get certified as SAP Certified Associate - SAP Activate Project Manager.

The certification is available since 2016.

There are currently, time of writing, close to 10,000 certified associate SAP Activate Project Managers.

Questions? Post as comment.

Useful? Give us a like and share on social media.

Thanks!


Once you passed the exam, you will receive a digital badge from Credly.

  • SAP Certified Associate - SAP Activate Project Manager


There are currently, time of writing, close to 10,000 certified associate SAP Activate Project Managers (excluding the 2016 edition and public cloud).

For today's count, see the Credly Directory.

  • Credly SAP Directory for C_ACTIVATE


Note that one needs to explicitly grant Credly the right to display your SAP certification on the platform. In other words, the total count could be (slightly) higher.



About the Exam 


Quote/unquote: The "SAP Certified Associate - SAP Activate Project Manager" certification exam verifies that the candidate has the knowledge required in the area of SAP project management. This certificate builds on basic consultant skills and experience that is then refined by practical experience during several projects. This exam validates whether SAP focused project managers have advanced business skills and the ability to apply methodologies and tools.

Information about the exam is published on the SAP Training website. This is also where you can book the exam (or get a Certification Hub subscription), and access the sample questions.

  • training.sap.com/certification/C_ACTIVATE13/




Validity


You can check the validity of the certifications at training.sap.com/certification/validity.

Previous versions of this certification are

  • C_ACTIVATE12

  • C_ACTIVATE05

  • C_ACT_2016


For the certification FAQs, see

  • SAP Global Certification FAQ – Overview

  • SAP Global Certification FAQ – Exam Process

  • SAP Global Certification FAQ – Post-Exam Process


SAP Certification Hub


To take the exam visit SAP Training and select Access the Certification Hub

  • training.sap.com/access


The hub is hosted by Questionmark. Here you can book your exam, (re-)schedule, check your appointments, and launch the exam.

For the complete exam list, see

  • Exam List | SAP Global Certification










The list of valid exams on the Questionmark website corresponds to the list of valid exams on the SAP Training portal.

However, certifications about to expire are only listed on the SAP Training portal, so you might want to check the future status of the certifcation first.

  • training.sap.com/certification/validity



Associates and Specialists


There is a related certification for SAP S/4HANA public cloud.

  • C_TS4C_YYYY | SAP Certified Application Associate - SAP S/4HANA Cloud (public) Implementation with SAP Activate


In addition, there are also three specialisation certifications, which you can take once you are certified as associate (recommendation, not requirement).

  • E_ACTCLD_YY | SAP Certified Specialist - SAP Activate for Cloud Solutions Project Manager

  • E_S4CEX_YYYY | SAP Certified Application Specialist - SAP S/4HANA Cloud - extended edition implementation with SAP Activate

  • E_S4CPE_YYYY | SAP Certified Application Specialist – SAP S/4HANA Cloud private edition Implementation with SAP Activate


There is some logic to the SAP exam codes, although it is not always consistently implemented.

  • C = consultant, i.e associate level type exam

  • E = expert, i.e level type exam (add-on to C level)

  • ACT and ACTIVATE for Activate Project Manager

  • S4C corresponds to S/4HANA Cloud

    • EX for Extended Edition

    • PE for Private Edition



  • CLD for Cloud

  • YY and YYYY represent the year


About the editions, see

  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud and On-Premise Deployment Options by amin.hoque


About the Cloud Specialist certification, see

  • Earning “SAP Activate for Cloud Solutions Project Manager” qualification by faisal.iqbal




Topic Areas


Exam Page


Information about the topic areas covered is listed on the exam page with the corresponding SAP training cours.

For SAP Activate this concerns course ACT100 for most topics, and ACT200 for the Agile project ones (see below).

The SAP S/4HANA edition, 1809 time of writing, is updated regularly.






Note the small print: "SAP reserves the right to update the exam content (topics, items, weighting) at any time" make sure to check the exam page before applying.



Sample Questions


On the exam page, there is a link to a trial exam with sample questions which closely resembles the real exam experience.

If it is obvious what the answer should be for all questions, you might be ready to take the exam. If you have no clue, you might want to study some more.



How to Prepare


Embark on a Journey


The questions on the exam are sourced from the referenced SAP trainings. That's what you need to know. It is not a prerequisites to sign up for the exam.

For some guidance, you can take the Learning Journey mapped out on the SAP Help Portal. The courses are referenced in the Become competent section but the journey also includes some additional content, beyond the scope of the exam, in the sections Start with an overview and Expand your skills, some of which freely available like openSAP courses or documentation references (depending on the journey). You can logon and mark your progress.

  • SAP S/4HANA - Implementation Tools and Methodology (SAP Activate)


For a learning journey travel guide, see

  • Guide to the Learning Journey for SAP Activate by colin.bailey


Note that there are learning journeys as well for the related and add-on certifications, e.g.

  • SAP Activate for Cloud Solutions - Project Management




Go to Your Class


To access the course ware you need a SAP Learning Hub subscription and enroll in the SAP Activate Learning Room.

  • learninghub.sap.com


The courses are available as e-learnings and e-books (and old-skool class format for some regions).

  • training.sap.com/course/ACT100

  • training.sap.com/course/ACT200



The e-book course shows displays the course manual. The e-learning shows the same material in a more easily disgestible format (depending on your preference).



openSAP


The learning journeys also includes several openSAP courses, sections Start with an overview and Expand your skills.

The introduction is a mini-course that can be watched in one go (4-5 hours).

  • Guide Your SAP S/4HANA Project to Success (Repeat) | Featuring experts from the SAP S/4HANA Regional Implementation Group








Note that the Repeat course is an update (2021) from an earlier edition (2020). Time of writing the learning journey sitll points to the older version.



Books


SAP PRESS


SAP PRESS has published a Certification Success Guide for SAP Activate, covering all the topics in depth and with a plethora of practice questions.

  • SAP Activate Project Management Certification Guide Certified Associate Exam by aditya.nlal05


You can browse the contents of the book and download a free sample chapter on the SAP PRESS website.

  • Chapter 2 - SAP Activate Elements



In addition, SAP PRESS has also published the quote/unquote go-to guide for your SAP S/4HANA implementation project.

  • SAP Activate by sven.denecken, jan.musil, and srivatsan.santhanam (2020)


You can browse the contents of the book and download a free sample chapter on the SAP PRESS website.

  • Chapter 5 - Configuration, Data Migration, Extensibility, Integration, and Testing




Additional Resources


SAP Community


To stay up to date, a regular visit to the SAP Activate topic area on the SAP Community for the latest blog posts, Q&A, and other community content is highly recommended.

  • community.sap.com/topics/activate


Here you can find a curated list of get started material plus featured content highlighting the latest news, e.g.

  • News from SAP Activate SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2111 by jan.musil


In the blogosphere of the community we also find travelogues about the certification journey.

  • My SAP Activate Certification Journey by bvialle


Or other interesting articles on the topic

  • Busting Myths of SAP Activate by daniel.ciecko

  • SAP Activate Blogging Challenge by nfatima14


Recommended reading!






You can follow the tag for blog post and/or questions area for notifications.

  • Tag for blog post about SAP Activate

  • SAP Activate “tag” on SAP Community Platform by rbyrne


Consider also to follow authors active on the topic area, to name but a few

  • faisal.iqbal

  • jocelyn.dart

  • jan.musil

  • sven.denecken


Udemy


In addition the official SAP sources, you'll also find plenty unofficial sources of information. One example is the Udemy platform, where anyone can upload courses without much, if any, quality check at the gate. There is often a sale going on, resulting in very attractively priced courses. Fly-by-night operators (typically anonymous) aside, some of the courses attract a high number of students and receive good reviews.

  • SAP Activate on Udemy (search term)








Before purchase make sure the content does not infringe with SAP's exam policy, as this may have consequences for your certification status. See Can I access exam questions in advance by buying them from a company or through a ‘brain dump’? and Can I share my exam questions?

  • Security Guidelines



Share and Connect


Questions? Please post as comment.

Useful? Give us a like and share on social media.

Thanks!

If you would like to receive updates, connect with me on

  • LinkedIn > linkedin.com/in/dvankempen

  • Twitter > @dvankempen


For the author page of SAP PRESS, visit

  • Denys van Kempen








Over the years, for the SAP HANA Academy, SAP’s Partner Innovation Lab, and à titre personnel, I have written a little over 300 posts here for the SAP Community. Some articles only reached a few readers. Others attracted quite a few more.For your reading pleasure and convenience, here is a curated list of posts which somehow managed to pass the 10k-view mile stone and, as sign of current interest, still tickle the counters each month.

  • Good Reads (my two cents)

entry.title: Five SAP Cloud Certifications in 10 Days: New Year’s Resolution Challenge
entry.content:
“This year, I’m going to learn something new. It’ll be fun, and I know I can do it.” That’s the thought I hope will run through your mind when you see the task before you.

Small and large businesses alike are adopting cloud computing. Some of you who aspire to become entrepreneurs are thinking about seizing this opportunity. But how do you get started? A developer or consultant might begin by earning appropriate certifications. Let’s start the new year by obtaining five cloud certifications in the next ten days. SAP will cover the preparation. Are you up for our New Year’s Resolution Challenge?



Are you ready to earn the latest cloud certifications?


SAP recently released new certifications for the Extension Suite, Integration Suite, and SAP HANA Cloud. As a developer or consultant, certifications focus on theoretical knowledge and help you show your interest and understanding. A solid understanding of these areas will prepare you for SAP’s Business Technology Platform.

Which sequence will we follow?



  • First, we will look at the SAP Certified Development Associate - SAP Extension Suite (C_CPE_13). Understanding the Extension Suite will give you a solid foundation of SAP Business Technology Platform and SAP Cloud Application Programming Model.

  • Your next step is to earn the SAP Certified Development Associate - SAP HANA Cloud 1.0 (C_HCDEV_01) certification, where you will show your knowledge of development with SAP CAP and SAP HANA Cloud. In this certification, you can build on the knowledge you gained before preparing for C_CPE_13.

  • Your following certifications, SAP Certified Application Associate - SAP HANA Cloud Modeling (C_HCMOD_01) and SAP Certified Technology Associate - SAP HANA Cloud Provisioning and Administration (C_HCADM_01), will focus on the modeling and administering SAP HANA Cloud. You will build your knowledge of SAP HANA Cloud offerings with each subsequent certification.

  • SAP Certified Development Associate - SAP Integration Suite (C_CPI_14) is the fifth and last certification you will pursue.



Having all five SAP Business Technology Platform certifications as a consultant or developer will give you a complete foundational picture of the platform. By following this order, you will build up further knowledge progressively on a broader foundation with each certification. Suppose you need two attempts to complete a certificate. In that case, you still have a chance to meet all the proposed certifications, or if you need a second pass twice, you still have a well-rounded set of certificates for development.

What you need to take on this challenge


SAP currently offers a new type of Learning Journey for free. It includes everything you need to prepare. The price of on-site training would be up to 2175 euros per training, while the cost of reading the material in the SAP Learning Hub would be less. So let's take advantage of SAP's current offer and utilize the free Learning Journeys.

  • C_CPE_13
    Learning Journey: Developing with SAP Extension Suite
    (Optional - Paid and Free) Certification Path: SAP Extensions Suite
    (Optional - Paid) Training: CLD200 - SAP Cloud Platform: Enterprise Extensions

  • C_HCDEV_01
    Learning Journey: Developing Applications Running on SAP BTP Using SAP HANA Cloud
    (Optional - Paid and Free) Certification Path: Application Development for SAP HANA
    (Optional - Paid) Training: HC450E - Application Development for SAP HANA Cloud 1.0

  • C_HCMOD_01
    Learning Journey: Modeling in SAP HANA Cloud
    (Optional - Paid and Free) Certification Path: SAP HANA Modeling
    (Optional - Paid) Training: HC300E - SAP HANA Cloud Modeling

  • C_HCADM_01
    SAP Learning Journey: Provisioning and Administration with SAP HANA Cloud
    (Optional - Paid and Free) Certification Path: SAP HANA Administration
    (Optional - Paid) Training: HC200E - SAP HANA Cloud Provisioning and Administration

  • C_CPI_14
    Learning Journey: Developing with SAP Integration Suite
    (Optional - Paid and Free) Certification Path: SAP Integration Suite
    (Optional - Paid) Training: CLD900 - SAP Cloud Platform Integration


While SAP offers Learning Journeys for free, certification attempts are not. Today, most people opt to buy, for example, six attempts for the SAP Global Certification Online exam rather than visit an SAP center on-site. These online exams cost 500 euros per 6 attempts in Germany. If your employer is willing to cover these costs, take advantage of your workplace’s education budget.


Time is as important as money in completing this challenge. There is a tendency for people to delay their certification attempts because they feel unprepared. You may feel better knowing you achieved way above the cut score, but much more time will only yield marginal gains. Two outcomes are possible. Either you fail or you pass. There is no middle ground. Our experience suggests that you should prepare for each certification for at least one and a half days. We challenge you to earn five cloud certifications within ten days.

Are you ready to take the lead on your SAP BTP journey?



Maintaining your skills and staying on top of new technologies can and should be a constant process. 2022 should be a year of learning and growth for you! Are you up for the New Year’s Challenge to earn five SAP Business Technology Platform certifications in 10 business days? Let’s get started on a prosperous new year together.

entry.title: Second edition of SAP Activate Book now available!
entry.content:
I want to thank on behalf of my co-authors and contributors to all SAP Activate users and fans that purchased SAP Activate book from SAPPRESS over since its publication in 2020. It has contributed to a great cause at St. Jude Children’s Research Hospital that I wrote about in the blog last year – you can find it here.


Today I’m happy to announce release of second edition of the SAP Activate book that we worked on over the past 6 months. This new edition has several improvements and new content I want to outline in this blog post. Just like the first edition, you can get a copy in e-book format, print or both at SAPPRESS. Use code SAPACT15 for 15% off.



First change that you will find in the book, aside from the change in color schema on the cover is the re-fresh of the entire text with the latest innovations SAP delivered for SAP S/4HANA in the past two years since the first edition came out. Here is a summary of what you can expect to find in each chapter:




  1. SAP S/4HANA Fundamentals – this chapter introduces the key technologies and functionality that SAP S/4HANA Cloud provides to organizations. We discuss the deployment strategies and briefly outline the transition paths that organizations take to bring their ERP in SAP S/4HANA Cloud. This text establishes the foundation for the rest of the book as chapters 7, 8 and 9 are providing more details on each transition path for new implementation, system conversion, selective data transition and hybrid landscape deployment.

  2. Introduction to SAP Activate – in the second chapter we introduce reader to SAP Activate and take them on a journey through each phase in the project lifecycle using SAP Activate. We also introduce this community to the readers and how to use the functions to share their expertise with blogs or leverage the questions to get answers from the community.

  3. Accessing SAP Activate – this text discusses the tooling that SAP customers use to access the ready-to-run business processes, methodology and capabilities for application lifecycle management in the project. We introduce SAP Cloud ALM, Roadmap Viewer, Best Practices Explorer and for customers with hybrid landscapes discuss the capabilities of SAP Solution Manager. This chapter has significant updates, especially for the SAP Cloud ALM section where the capabilities available in the product grew since we first introduced it.

  4. Starting with a Working System – this chapter dives deeper into the ready-to-run business process content. We introduce the SAP Best Practices and the enterprise management layer for SAP S/4HANA Cloud. The text walks you through the available business content and accelerators that SAP delivers with these packages for public cloud, private cloud and on-premise deployments.

  5. Configuration, Data Migration, Extensibility, Integration, and Testing – in this chapter the authors take you through the key capabilities in SAP S/4HANA Cloud for configuration, data migration, extensibility, integration, and testing. The goal is to introduce the tools that are later referenced in the individual chapters detailing the process for specific version of SAP S/4HANA Cloud (chapters 7 and 8).

  6. Agile Project Delivery – in this chapter we cover the use of agile techniques inside the SAP project. We cover the roles, governance, ceremonies that the project team follows to establish a true agile approach in your SAP S/4HANA deployment. We also discuss how organizations using Scaled Agile Framework benefit from using SAP Activate in their environment. I have also discussed this topic in this blog post.

  7. New Implementation of SAP S/4HANA – this chapter is the largest of the entire book as it covers the details of deploying SAP S/4HANA Cloud and SAP S/4HANA using the new implementation approach. It covers deployment of public cloud, private cloud and on-premise solution using SAP Activate. We recommend that you review the sub-chapter relevant for your project and use this chapter on an on-going basis as a reference.

  8. System Conversion and Selective Data Transition to SAP S/4HANA – system conversion is gaining popularity with customers transitioning into SAP S/4HANA Cloud and is covered along the phases of SAP Activate in this chapter. We also briefly discuss the selective data transition and provide pointers to consider while planning and executing your transition journey.

  9. Deploying Hybrid System Landscapes – this text has been enhanced with the coverage for new scenarios available for hybrid deployments using Two-Tier deployment scenarios. The chapter covers scenarios across finance, sales, procurement, manufacturing, and analytics. We also recommend you review the white paper for Two-Tier deployment published here.

  10. Organizational Change Management – driving solution adoption and change is critical for any transformation project to be successful and to realize customer value. This chapter provides a play-by-play walk through the project and details steps and best practices that successful project teams take to actively drive successful change process.

  11. SAP Activate for Other SAP Products – in this chapter we briefly discuss the other versions of SAP Activate for other SAP products and solutions.


Additionally, to the text above, the Appendix A has an updated practice questions and answers to get you ready for SAP Activate certification exam. You can also review this blog post from Brice on how he prepared for his certification exam.


Appendix B with all the authors and contributors to the book. Here is a list of colleagues that have contributed to the SAP Activate edition 2 and also have SAP Community profile. You can easily follow them to stay up to date on their new blogs in the SAP Community.




  • sven.denecken

  • jan.musil

  • srivatsan.santhanam

  • vital.anderhub

  • swati.balani

  • lbettuzzi

  • itendrab3442

  • rbyrne

  • daniel.ciecko

  • 1630_a

  • christina.galbreath

  • amin.hoque

  • y4huang2003

  • adnette.kamugisha

  • lisa.kouch

  • anil.kumar.k.r

  • shivakumar.hs

  • prasanthpadmanabhan.menon

  • andreas.muno

  • kstledger

  • ohlingerpe

  • motun

  • reshmi.paul

  • jagmohansingh.chawla

  • christian.vogler2


You can explore more SAP Activate resources in SAP Community using tag  #sapactivate, we also encourage you to consider following our sister communities SAP S/4HANA Cloud and SAP Cloud ALM. Let us know your thoughts in the comments to this blog post or via questions in the SAP Activate community.


As always, I would like to encourage you to subscribe to our podcast “Inside SAP S/4HANA” and follow the SAP Activate tagon SAP Community. The podcast leverages the unique knowledge and expertise of SAP S/4HANA product experts, partners and customers to address your needs by sharing product insights and project best practice. There is no customer success without product success and project success; we help you get to the next level and make your SAP S/4HANA projects a success. Subscribe now and benefit from the shared knowledge.


Follow us via our SAP Community tag and page #sapactivate or myself directly via jan.musil.






















Stay tuned for more updates and blogs.




Turn on your notification to receive updates or information about items requiring your attention. To enable notifications, follow the steps on the SAP Community Resources page.



Inside SAP S/4HANA Podcast




As always, I would like to encourage you to subscribe to our new podcast “Inside SAP S/4HANA”. This podcast leverages the unique knowledge and expertise of SAP S/4HANA product experts, partners, and customers to address your needs by sharing product insights and project best practices. There is no customer success without product success and project success; we help you get to the next level and make your SAP S/4HANA projects a success. Subscribe now and benefit from the shared knowledge.



OpenSAP Microlearning for SAP S/4HANA




We launched openSAP microlearning for SAP S/4HANA as an exciting new learning opportunity. What began with a small batch of 20 videos, has now become a channel with more than 50 microlearning that have generated over 20,000 views since then. Today we cover multiple lines of business, like Finance Manufacturing & Supply Chain, and key technology topics like Master Data Management, Extensibility, User Experience, and Upgrade Management. We are continuously adding new microlearning to the SAP S/4HANA channel, so make sure you check them out.



Your voice matters!




If you want to learn more and actively engage with SAP subject matter experts on SAP S/4HANA Cloud, join our SAP S/4HANA Cloud Customer Community. This platform which is available to SAP S/4HANA Cloud customers and partners has a clear mission: to deliver an interactive community to engage with one another about best practices and product solutions.

entry.title: My SAP Activate(C_ACTIVATE13) Certification Project
entry.content:
About Me

I work as SAP SD, IS Retial and Fashion/AFS Consultant, I have successfully passed four SAP certification before SAP Activate

1) mySAP Supply Chain Management - Order Fulfillment (SAP SD)

2) C_ISR_60 SAP Certified Application Associate - Retail with SAP ERP 6.0,

3) C_HANAIMP151 SAP Certified Application Associate - SAP HANA (Edition 2015)

4) SAP Certified Application Associate - SAP S/4HANA Sales 1909 in past

Also I have done some training and internal certification with my employer on Agile and Scrum. Previous experience does help as you know about SAP Project Management, have exam experience, you know how to prepare for sap certification and also you know the rules (dos and don'ts) of exam, If you are new then you need to gain some work experience.

Purpose of this Blog - to help other community member who aspire to get certified in SAP Activate Project Management. About Me will help understand what was my background and how I approached SAP Activate(C_ACTIVATE13) as a mini Certification project.

Brief About the Exam 

First Step is to go through SAP Training , few things to note Exam has 80 questions , you have 180 mins and you need to score at least 65%. Also note says "SAP recommends combining education courses and hands-on experience to prepare for your certification exam as questions will test your ability to apply the knowledge you have gained in training"

Your Project management skill will start at this first step as you need to take the task of SAP Activate Certification as a Project. My goal was to get at least 52 correct answers out of 80. Keep last 30 mins for review. In 150 mins i need to answer 80 questions which is roughly 1.8 mins for each question.

Plan for SAP Activate Exam

Second step is to prepare your own project plan broken down into tasks (or i can say your own product backlog)  which you feel comfortable,  As you will have of lot of other tasks to handle in your life, it does help to put a plan and do review it as often as you can. it will help you to keep on track (may be you can use burndown chart)  and also you can book your exam date. If you spare 1-2 hrs a day , you can expect your certification project to complete in 1.5 months.

Sample Questions on SAP Training was useful , actual test will have same pattern

Quizlet Practice Question was useful

 

 

My Plan


Resources/Assets for my project

SAP Activate Methodology (ACT100) - Classroom Training or if you have SAP Learning Hub access you can go through E-Book, E-Learning and Assessment for ACT100 - Majority of questions are from ACT100


Agile Project Delivery (ACt200) -  Classroom Training or if you have SAP Learning Hub access you  can you can go through E-Book for ACT200 - few questions are from AC2100. 

 

 

 

Learning Journey - SAP S/4HANA - Implementation Tools and Methodology (SAP Activate) has other resources/assets like open sap course, learning room and related resources/assets which make you competent as SAP Activate Project Manager.


Above two resources/assets are not enough you need to have SAP Project Management Experience, also knowledge about Agile/Scrum process . If you are know to project management specially in agile/scrum process you should learn about scrum from https://www.scrum.org/

Resource/assets which i have not used but can be useful 



SAP Activate Project Management Certification Guide

 

 

 

 

 

SAP Activate Project Management for SAP S/4HANA   


Pay for the Exam



Third step is to pay for your exam. You need to buy SAP Certification attempts from SAP training. Once you get Subscription you can schedule your exam from SAP  Certification Hub. When you schedule your exam make sure your timezone is correct. Wrong timezone in your setting can cause confusion about your scheduled exam time.

 

 

On the Day of the Exam

If you have opted for be sure to login at least 15 minutes before your exam. Login into SAP Training , Navigate to "Access Purchased Subscription" then "Access the Certification hub" , on your scheduled exam you will find "Start Exam". Be sure to be at quite place without any disturbance and your desk/room is clean.

Does Certificate help you in becoming SAP Activate Project Manager?

It may not be true but it does help to gain knowledge and also helps you to know how Agile/Scrum projects are handled within SAP Ecosystem.  It does gives you Jump Start in S/4 HANA projects as Project Manager or Scrum Master , like SAP Activate gives jump start to S/4 HANA projects. Also it gives confidence to all your project stakeholders and client that you have required knowledge and skills to handle large Transformation Projects. With So Many Transformation Projects in pipeline it can give boost to your career.

Jitesh Mehta

entry.title: Back on the Road - SMB Innovation Summit Orlando
entry.content:
Two years of worldwide restrictions due to the pandemic situation landed down face-to-face events everywhere. People got used to talk to a camera and connect remotely. So when you have the chance to revisit that 'normal life', expectations are that you will find all of that terrifying or at least very strange, right? Not exactly.

On May 24-26 I attended SMB Innovation Summit, in Orlando, FL. A two years hiatus set all of us apart of one of the finest SAP events. And suddenly I was there, in sunny Orlando, at OMNI Resort at ChampionsGate. Impecable organization has followed, as usual. In the first day, early in the morning, I crowded the SAP Integration and Certification Center booth to get started.

What followed was nice and extraordinary at the same time. People that I have not had a chance to meet in person for at least 3 years now (since the last event edition back in 2019) approached to greet me. Handshakes, hugs, large smiles. Satisfaction was in the face of everybody for being all together again. Strangely, it seemed to be not real that we were distant for so long time. It was like crossing a time warp, forgetting for a moment all that we have passed in the recent years. It's really true that technology has brought us closer.

The event counted on more than 700 attendees coming from all corners of Americas, Europe, and even Asia and Midle-East. SAP Partners, product owners, developers, first-time visitors, the public was all focused on SMB segment. The keynotes covered SAP solutions roadmap, SAP Business Technology Platform, marketing in this new world and gave room to SAP S/4HANA Cloud as well. The motivational pitch was offered by Jim Lawless, British's deepest freediver, on his Taming Tigers speach.

The SMB Innovation Summit is happening in three locations worldwide: Orlando (May 24-26), Manila (June 7-8) and Dublin (June 14-16).

SAP BTP Certifications


Video Tutorials


As advertised, the SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP) brings together data and analytics, artificial intelligence, application development, automation, and integration in one, unified environment.

The platform includes many different product and services bundled in distinct portfolios. For some of these services, one or more certifications are available.

In this article, we cover the SAP BTP Extension Developer certification, previously named SAP Extension Suite.

Watching the complete series of 15 videos takes about 100 minutes, covering all topic areas

  • SAP Business Technology Platform and the Cloud Foundry environment

entry.title: How to Prepare for SAP Certification
entry.content:
How to Prepare for SAP Certification

Dear SAP Friends,

In this blog, I wanted to share the preparation steps for SAP certification – My experience after passing 12 certifications

Nowadays SAP Certification has become a Trump card to get selected for a job as a fresher or for an experienced professional. (Importance of SAP Certification: - SAP Certification | SAP Blogs)

But please be remembered doing a certification won’t give you the assurance getting a job Certification may help to shortlist your profile. 

In the beginning, I was very much worried or got scared to prepare for certification, but then I figured out a simple way to prepare.

For example, I will take Manufacturing Certification. So, for any certification which you wanted to do go to SAP Training Shop and look out for the respective one, once you open you can see topics, and books to refer to and the percentage of questions that will come.

Sl. No
Topic Areas
Books to Refer
Question coverage

1

Advanced Planning in SAP S/4HANA

TS421 (SAP S/4HANA 2021)

TS422 (SAP S/4HANA 2021)

----- OR -----

S4220 (SAP S/4HANA 2021)

>12%

2

Production Orders in SAP S/4HANA

TS421 (SAP S/4HANA 2021)

TS422 (SAP S/4HANA 2021)

----- OR -----

S4225 (SAP S/4HANA 2021)

>12%

3

Master Data in SAP S/4HANA

TS421 (SAP S/4HANA 2021)

TS422 (SAP S/4HANA 2021)

----- OR -----

S4210 (SAP S/4HANA 2021)

>12%

4

Material Requirements Planning in SAP S/4HANA

TS421 (SAP S/4HANA 2021)

TS422 (SAP S/4HANA 2021)

8-12%

5

Lean Manufacturing in SAP S/4HANA

TS421 (SAP S/4HANA 2021)

TS422 (SAP S/4HANA 2021)

----- OR -----

S4220 (SAP S/4HANA 2021)

8-12%

6

Capacity Planning in SAP S/4HANA

TS421 (SAP S/4HANA 2021)

TS422 (SAP S/4HANA 2021)

----- OR -----

S4230 (SAP S/4HANA 2021)

8-12%

7

Demand Management in SAP S/4HANA

TS421 (SAP S/4HANA 2021)

TS422 (SAP S/4HANA 2021)

----- OR -----

S4220 (SAP S/4HANA 2021)

<8%

8

Introduction to SAP S/4HANA Production Planning

TS421 (SAP S/4HANA 2021)

TS422 (SAP S/4HANA 2021)

----- OR -----

S4220 (SAP S/4HANA 2021)

<8%

9

Introduction to SAP S/4HANA Supply Chain Planning

TS421 (SAP S/4HANA 2021)

TS422 (SAP S/4HANA 2021)

----- OR -----

S4220 (SAP S/4HANA 2021)

<8%

10

Process Orders in SAP S/4HANA

TS421 (SAP S/4HANA 2021)

TS422 (SAP S/4HANA 2021)

----- OR -----

S4220 (SAP S/4HANA 2021)

<8%

 

How to prepare:

  • All the questions will be coming from books mentioned
  • Prepare each topic by analyzing and comparing it with real-time functionality.
  • Practice all exercises which have mentioned at the end of each chapter mainly in Fiori.
  • Try to understand the configuration and the value entered in each screen.
  • Try to understand the end user-level transactions and functionality.

There will be a total of 80 questions that need to answer in 3 hours’ time.

The pass percentage and languages available will be varying from Version to version and module to module.

For example I took it's 54%, There won’t be any negative marks for wrongly answered questions.

All the questions will be objective with 1,2 & 3 correct answers, so we need to pay attention to how many correct answers to select.

Once Completed Exam

  • Immediately you will know whether you cleared the exam or not

  • With each topic mark, you got

if you have not cleared in which topic, you got less marks you can see and prepare for next time

Already written blogs on

how to register for certification: -  Registration Steps for SAP Certification. | SAP Blogs

How to download the certificate: - SAP Certification Download from Acclaim | SAP Blogs

Thanks & Regards
Ruthvik Chowdary
SME-S/4HANA Logistics
SAP Champion

entry.title: Empowering Success: SAP Commerce Cloud Certification Preparation Live Sessions
entry.content:
Abstract

In the dynamic landscape of SAP Commerce Cloud, staying ahead requires comprehensive preparation and guidance. To facilitate this, two certification preparation live sessions are scheduled from Q1 2024 on, designed to empower learners in their pursuit of success in the most crucial SAP Commerce Cloud certification exams.

Live Sessions Overview

Live Session 1 (1 hour): Certification Live Session: SAP Commerce Cloud – Business User Certification Preparation

  • Purpose: The first live session aims to support participants in their preparation for the associate-level certification - SAP Certified Application Associate - SAP Commerce Cloud Business User.
  • Certification Level: Associate
  • Targeted Audience: Business Consultants, Technology Consultants and Software Architects or anyone who wants to attend the certification exam.
  • Agenda:
    • Spotlight on Essential Topics: Concentrate on pivotal subjects outlined in the Business User Certification Exam, highlighting the essential aspects that will be checked during the exam.
    • Optimal Certification Preparation: Offer expert guidance on structuring a study plan for effective preparation at the associate level.

Live Session 2 (1 hour): Certification Live Session: SAP Commerce Cloud - Developer Certification Preparation

  • Purpose: The second live session is dedicated to assisting participants in achieving success in the professional-level certification - SAP Certified Development Professional - SAP Commerce Cloud Developer.
  • Certification Level: Professional
  • Targeted Audience: Software Developers, Software Architects and Technology Consultants or anyone who wants to attend the certification exam.
  • Agenda:
    • Spotlight on Essential Topics: Delve into critical topics outlined in the Developer Certification Exam, emphasizing essential aspects to be checked during the exam.
    • Optimal Certification Preparation: Provide expert insights and recommendations to guide learners in formulating an effective study plan for the professional-level exam.

Common Elements Across Both Live Sessions

Detailed Topic Coverage: Both live sessions will systematically go through the topic areas of each exam, providing comprehensive coverage and highlighting essential aspects that will be assessed in the certification exams.

Additional Information

Interactive Learning: The sessions will be interactive, allowing participants to engage with the content, ask questions, and benefit from the collective knowledge and experience of the instructors.

Focused Learning: The emphasis will be on delivering in-depth insights into exam topics to enhance participants' overall understanding without specific mention of time management or tackling challenging questions.

Note: Please be aware that both certifications will be updated soon to align with the latest version of SAP Commerce Cloud.

Conclusion

In conclusion, the upcoming live sessions from Q1 2024 on aim to be a cornerstone in learners' journey towards SAP Commerce Cloud certification success. Whether aspiring developers or business users, participants can expect comprehensive coverage of essential exam topics and expert advice on optimal preparation. These sessions are not just about passing exams but about empowering individuals to excel in their roles within the SAP Commerce Cloud ecosystem.

Last But Not Least

If you want to know more or get informed about the latest enablement offerings about SAP Commerce Cloud, please follow me by clicking on the “follow” button on the left.

Thanks for reading! and see you next!

entry.title: New Trainings to Achieve Business Process Skills for SAP S/4HANA
entry.content:
This is a significant cornerstone in producing great digital content for Finance in line with the latest course design principles. These are the characteristics of the new Finance learning journeys:

    • Designed primarily for self-paced learning
    • Tailored storyboards to fit real learners’ needs
    • Composed for efficient use of our learner’s time
    • Deployment agnostic - simultaneously valid for SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition, for SAP S/4HANA Cloud, private edition and for SAP S/4HANA.

All learners from SAP customers and partners and who want to achieve foundational business process skills for Accounting processes on SAP S/4HANA are invited to use our free learning journeys. Just give these a try:

    • Outlining the Financial Accounting Overview in SAP S/4HANA
    • Outlining the Record-to-Report Process in SAP S/4HANA
    • Describing the Payables Management Process in SAP S/4HANA
    • Describing the Receivables Management Process in SAP S/4HANA
    • Performing Asset Accounting Process in SAP S/4HANA
    • Outlining Cost Management and Profitability Analysis in SAP S/4HANA​
    • Performing Overhead Cost Controlling​ in SAP S/4HANA

    • Discovering Bank Account Administration in SAP S/4HANA

If you are unsure which one to start with, I highly recommend you to take a look at this blog where my colleague provides some recommendation and short introduction on each of these learning journeys. 

Great Content
All these learning journeys include valuable learning content using different kinds of media, such as videos, graphics, animations, system demos, quizzes, etc.

One-Stop-Shop for all delivery formats
Through different clickable tabs, the learning journey gives you directions on related deliverables.

    • Passing the quizzes at the end of each unit will lead to a Record of Achievement.
    • The Hands-on Practice area offers you a link to booking options to get access to our training system environment. The learning journeys listed above go along with SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition as a training system. Exercises are designed for any deployment version. As before, learners can use our training systems through Learning System Access. This requires a valid subscription to SAP Learning Hub, professional edition or solution edition for Finance.
    • The SAP Learning Class part takes you to related classroom offering and all scheduled classroom events.

With this milestone reached, the new enablement offering for all foundational courses on business process skills in Accounting are complete. These learning journeys can also be accessed from the related product pages on learning.sap.com:

    • Landing page for SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Financial Management
    • Landing Page for SAP S/4HANA, Financial Accounting
    • Landing Page for SAP S/4HANA, Management Accounting

Our next step will be to publish new courses that also include configuration content. With this, we will leave the foundational level of proficiency and enter the intermediate level. Some of these courses are already in preparation. Therefore – stay tuned!
Best regards, Doris Lindauer

entry.title: New Training Portfolio for Group Reporting
entry.content:
The Group Reporting training portfolio for SAP S/4HANA has been rebuilt and is now natively designed for self-paced learning but also available as classroom training. This is an important step in producing digital content for Finance in line with the latest course design principles, as already outlined in my previous blog ‘New Trainings to Achieve Business Process Skills for SAP S/4HANA’.

All learners from SAP customers and partners and who want to achieve skills on SAP Group Reporting are recommended to use the following learning journeys:

  • Introducing SAP S/4HANA Cloud for group reporting (foundational level / business user)

  • Performing Consolidation with SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Group Reporting (intermediate level / business user and consultant)

  • Implementing SAP S/4HANA Cloud for group reporting (intermediate level / business user and consultant)


A fourth learning journey will focus on Consolidation of Investments and is currently in production. The four new learning journeys will replace the traditional course portfolio (S4F94, S4F95, S4F96). As a result, the associate certification for SAP Group Reporting will be discontinued.

While foundational learning journeys focus on business process skills and mainly address business users, intermediate level learning journeys also include configuration knowledge and are therefore targeted at both, business users and consultants.

All learning journeys include a summary of all related delivery formats:

  • A Record of Achievement is available for all foundational and intermediate learning journeys and will be issued to a learner once a significant part of all questions included at the end of each chapter are answered correctly.

  • Some learning journeys offer the opportunity to book a system for Hands-on Practice. Learners are encouraged to use exercises provided, which are considered valuable practice regardless of whether they plan to implement SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Group Reporting or SAP S/4HANA Finance for Group Reporting (the on-premise or private cloud system environment). Access to training systems requires a valid subscription to SAP Learning Hub, professional edition or solution edition for Finance and a booking of the respective Learning System access.

  • The SAP Learning Class part takes you to related classroom offering and all scheduled classroom events.


The links to all relevant and future learning journeys for SAP Group Reporting are summarized on the following landing pages:

  • Landing page for SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Financial Management

  • Landing Page for SAP S/4HANA, Financial Consolidation


The classic SAP Group Reporting learning journey on help.sap.com and SAP Learning Hub has been adjusted so that the new recommended learning paths are reflected accordingly.

Our next step will be to produce the next and the last Group Reporting learning journey.

Please watch out for further announcements!

Best regards, Doris Lindauer

entry.title: Certify Your Skills as SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Implementation Consultant
entry.content:
Certify Your Skills as SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Implementation Consultant and Boost Your Career

 As businesses move to the cloud, 91 percent of companies use an ERP as a central element of their application landscape – and most of them turn to SAP’s SAP S/4HANA Cloud solution. However, choosing the right software is not the only key to success. To stay ahead of the curve and secure business success, organizations seek the help of skilled SAP consultants whose expertise is vital to help organizations leverage the full capabilities of SAP’s cloud-native ERP.

And this is where you come in. To support you in getting ready for your next career step, and to help you acquire the future-focused skills you need to help organizations drive success in the cloud, SAP just launched a new role-based certification for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Implementation Consultants. If you are looking for future-focused learning resources that perfectly align with your consulting role and responsibilities, help you acquire a sustainable skill set, and get you certified to prove your expertise, this is for you!

To get you started, here are 3 things you need to know about the new role-based certification for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Implementation Consultants:

The certification is tailored to your consulting role and responsibilities.

The corresponding learning journeys help you in strengthening the core skills and the must-knows a consultant requires to implement SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. This includes for example a cloud mindset, SAP Fit-to-standard processes, SAP Central Business Configuration, SAP Activate implementation methodology and SAP Cloud Application Lifecycle Management (ALM), extension methods, SAP’s cloud integration technologies, SAP’s clean core strategy, SAP Fiori UX and other innovations, as well as data migration and integration testing.

You can choose between 4 different role-based certifications for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Implementation Consultants.

To ensure that our partners and customers have the latest skills, we are introducing a new role-based certifications for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition that can be achieved to demonstrate expertise:

  • “SAP Certified Associate - Implementation Consultant SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition” (C_S4CPB_2402)

This certification is designed for all learners who want to validate their core implementation skills and those currently certified in one of the retired SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition related certifications.

We do believe that line of business/industry-specific knowledge is relevant. This is why we offer skill validation opportunities for multiple lines of business. For learners interested in financial accounting, sales, and sourcing and procurement, we offer the following certifications, combining both SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition implementation knowledge and core business process knowledge:

  • “SAP Certified Associate - Implementation Consultant SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, Financial Accounting” (C_S4CFI_2402)
  • “SAP Certified Associate - Implementation Consultant SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, Sourcing and Procurement” (C_S4CPR_2402)
  • “SAP Certified Associate - Implementation Consultant SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, Sales” (C_S4CS_2402)

For learners interested in manufacturing, asset management, professional services, warehouse, supply chain, and service, we offer an intermediate level record of achievement as an addition to the “SAP Certified Associate - Implementation Consultant SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition” (C_S4CPB_2402) certification to demonstrate their skills in their specific area of expertise. The records of achievement can be achieved by completing the respective learning journeys on SAP Learning site.

The role-based certification can help you achieve your next career goal.

SAP is transitioning to a role-based certification program, and this can make it easier for you to find the perfect certification and learning resources for your next career step as role-based certifications get you exactly the input you need for your designated tasks and responsibilities. They help you streamline your certification journey by concentrating on the areas directly applicable to your consulting expertise and as SAP S/4HANA Cloud evolves, your role-based certification keeps you abreast of the latest features, enhancements, and client demands, making your skills more sustainable and adaptable.

Are you still unsure where to start? Don’t worry, it’s as easy as 1,2,3:

  1. Identify Your consulting role: Choose the certification or record of achievement that best aligns with your consulting role and line of business.
  2. Learn new skills and stay up to date with the latest innovations with SAP’s self-paced learning journeys on the SAP Learning site.
  3. Get certified and validate your expertise by taking the certification exam or quizzes, highlighting your mastery in your specific consulting domain.

Are you already certified in an SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition related certification? Learn how to transition to the new certification program and visit the FAQ on SAP Learning site to get your questions answered.

entry.title: Unlocking Success with SAP: Syed's Inspiring Journey to DemoJam Triumph
entry.content:
Syed couldn't imagine what it would feel like to be on a big stage. He couldn’t image the wild clapping and shouting coming from a crowded room of tech enthusiasts. He couldn't imagine the feeling he would have in his stomach when the six important minutes began – his team’s six important minutes. “I just thought, how can I be so lucky?” Syed was thrilled. He was driven by the excitement of the room – and his own. 

Syed used the SAP Learning site to quickly gain new skills.“It was my first time in a competition”, the 30-year-old from Bangalore recounts. With his colleague Navin, Syed presented their innovative solution addressing a supply chain problem in India: the issue of counterfeit drugs. And they did it on stage the SAP TechEd DemoJam in 2023. Six teams were given six minutes each to present their solution to a problem – live in front of hundreds of people. No mock-ups were allowed, their demo had to be flawless. “My mentor Chandramohan Sankaran, alongside my colleagues such as Kesavan and Vipin, actively contributed to my DemoJam journey. Their diligent efforts and valuable feedback significantly elevated our demo story, pushing it to new heights.” And they secured the first place in the competition.  

Newfound knowledge helped clinch the victory 

However, it didn’t come along that easy, the Senior Product Specialist at SAP Labs Bangalore explains. With only 15 to 20 days to prepare the demo, the duo turned to the SAP Learning site to quickly gain expertise in technologies such as SAP Cloud Application Programming Model, SAP Build Apps, SAP Build Process Automation, SAP Mobile Start, SAP S/4HANA Extension, SAP Adobe Forms, Integration and more. “The knowledge acquired played a pivotal role in delivering the best solution within the tight timeframe, ultimately leading to our success”, Syed says and adds: “I am grateful for the valuable resources provided by SAP, which significantly contributed to our achievements.” 

But Syed’s dedication to staying informed about the latest technologies and innovations does not only define his professional life as a Senior Product Specialist, where he strives to staying at the forefront of SAP advancements and contributing to the development and success of SAP Business Technology Platform. It has also long permeated into his private life as well, where the father of a 3-year-old daughter feels equally excited by cheering when he's in the kitchen. “I enjoy exploring new cuisines and trying out different recipes in my kitchen”, he says, stating that he is a Biryani expert who knows his way around the famous South Indian rice dish. It’s again a testament to his love for continuous learning.  

Broader skillset and industry recognition 

“Learning something new has always brought about significant positive changes in my life”, Syed says. “And acquiring knowledge and skills, particularly through platforms like the SAP Learning site, has enhanced my professional competence. It fostered a mindset of continuous improvement and problem-solving, enabling me to address challenges creatively. It has broadened my skillset and positively influenced various aspects of my professional life, including networking opportunities and industry recognition. In essence, continuous learning has played a pivotal role in my overall growth and success in the dynamic field of SAP technologies.”  

And for those who are still thinking about whether to make their appearance on a big stage and showcase their newfound skills, Syed has a clear message: “If I can do it – you can do it too.” 

Start your own success story   

Did you feel inspired by Syed’s story? Then kick-start your own success story with SAP today. Benefit from tailored and self-paced learning opportunities that meet you when and where you learn best on SAP Learning site. Get certified to demonstrate your expertise and boost your career. We are looking forward to many more great success stories!

entry.title: Unlocking Success in the Cloud: SAP transitions to role-based and skill-driven Certifications
entry.content:
Dear Community, 

It’s no news that businesses are changing faster than ever before. With organizations becoming intelligent and future-proof, and the move to the cloud in full swing, we are seeing more and more job roles being transformed as well. The World Economic Forum predicts that more than 40% of skills and 1 billion jobs will change based on the introduction of new technologies by the end of the decade. 

Now more than ever, it’s crucial that upskilling and reskilling opportunities are readily available to help people and organizations continue to innovate and grow.  

For this reason, SAP is refocusing its certification portfolio on the jobs that we believe are most critical to enable successful Cloud adoption and S/4HANA Cloud transformation. We’re doing this in two ways.  

First, last year we introduced a role-based certification model that focuses on the full skill set required to perform a job instead of product functions.  

Second, this year we are introducing the “get and stay certified” model to better react to fast emerging and changing technologies and make upskilling easier for you. With this new approach, you will have access to all relevant updates for your role on products, skills, and new technologies with tailored, skill-based delta content. And you will be able to verify and keep your skills sharp with assessments attached to your SAP certification. We have also updated the validity period for certifications. Once you pass an assessment, your certification validity will be extended by 12 months from the assessment completion date.  

Our target is to empower our ecosystem to become – and remain – certified SAP experts, build a stronger workforce that can successfully and reliably deliver the critical projects our customers need. Our role-based certifications are designed to support you in identifying your next career step, choose your next learning goal or certification opportunity.

We know that being able to showcase your up-to-date skills is key to both your personal and your organization's success. And this is why we are thrilled about transforming the SAP Certification program!  

Stay tuned for more to come! And please share any feedback or questions you have. Thank you!

entry.title: SAP Learning Hub and SAP Product Training Updates and News with Jan Meyer
entry.content:
🎧 Listen to the entire Podcast on SAP Podcasts - Apple Podcast  -   Spotify .

In this episode we have Jan Meyer, Senior Vice President and Global Head of Learning Systems at SAP. Jan shares the evolution of SAP product learning over the years, he highlights the updates and latest news in SAP Learning Hub and looks into the future of SAP Product Learning.

SAP Training and its evolution over the last years 

SAP Product Learning has transformed from merely classroom-based to a blended, flexible to consume learning offering with different elements like digital self-paced, collaborative or instructor led learning.

Jan describes the different drivers like the emergence of cloud and SaaS software and thus the need to scale and speed up learning and skill-development. Jan notes that digital and virtual learning methods have a wider reach due to their flexibility and 24/7 availability, although traditional methods remain important. He cites examples of professionals causing problems in projects due to outdated product knowledge.

In  the beginning of 2024 there were different changes in SAP Learning Hub, the platform for digital SAP Training. 

SAP Learning Hub Updates 2024

The SAP Learning Hub 2024 is now offering an enhanced, optimized learning experience and a simplified, cost-optimized purchase. The goal is to scale learning and making learning for SAP software solutions more accessible to SAP customers and partners.
The new offerings include:

  • Two cost-effective subscription editions, one for customers and one for partners. In the past there were many editions and it was complex to find the right one. 
  • 180+ training systems with unlimited access. You can practice according to pre-defined exercises in your very own system which is an improvement to the past. (I know some customers use those systems beyond training, e.g. to evaluate software). 
  • 4.200+ live sessions in various languages and time zones held by SAP experts. This has been continuously expanded across solutions and is now only accessible via SAP Learning Hub. Live-sessions are a good enhancement to self-paced learning as it gives direct access to experts where you can ask questions. (I sometimes find it easier to have a date in my calendar than motivating and structuring myself to learn self-paced). 
  • Monitoring dashboards for learning analytics and learning management. Feedback on learning progress is important for individuals as well as on organizational level. This was previously available only to selected customers and now supports the management of learning and use of SAP Learning Hub as part of SAP transformations. 
  • 4 certification attempts are included in the subscription - while SAP Certification is undergoing a transformation towards a more role-based approach. 

This complements the proven elements like learning content in different languages, collaboration in learning rooms or the offers to stay current and certified with regular assessments and learning contents.

On learning.sap.com, a single place for SAP product learning content consisting of text, videos or self-assessments is now available for free. The content was redesigned for a digital-first experience. It is simple to access, simple to find and made modular and thus the free start. The SAP Learning Hub remains as SAP's premium learning offering with all the above mentioned elements.

Jan Meyer highlights also the decision to connect the learning site with the SAP Community for asynchronous collaborative learning. 

The goal is to make the learning experience more efficient, scalable, and personal.

Future Ideas for SAP Product Learning

In the third part of the podcast Jan Meyer shares his ideas on the future developments for SAP's learning experience. He emphasizes the importance of the primary destination for all SAP product learning. So for example openSAP is also in the process to migrate to the SAP Learning site. He also mentions the ongoing transformation of SAP's certification process to become more role-based, aligning with the real-life roles of learners in their ecosystem. Jan also highlights the potential of AI. A benefit for example lies in creating and translating more content, and this could help the learning organization do more and do it faster. Finally, he briefly mentions the bridge between learning and workforce management as a growing trend, and the use of AI to provide personalized learning journeys.

Jan also shares his narrative for learning and training. 

"We see clearly that learning adds significant business value through the entire customer value journey, from the buying phase to the implementation and adoption phase, and then through the consumption phase ..... So we clearly see that learning adds significant business value"

Find the entire talk in the EducationNewscast Podcast. 

Looking forward for any questions or comments. 

Shownotes

Jan Meyer on LinkedIn 
SAP Learning Hub on SAP.com  
SAP Learning Hub access   
SAPNewsbyte: SAP Offers Professionals New Digital Learning and Certification
Podcast: ENC283 – Artificial Intelligence at SAP Product Learning with Frank Wrubel 
Q&A Webinar (german language) at 5th of march: Whats new in SAP Learning Hub
Swedish online-radio

entry.title: How to Boost Your Career with SAP’s New Learning and Certification Offerings
entry.content:
It's no secret that the need for skilled IT professionals is skyrocketing, with the U.S. Department of Labor alone predicting a substantial 23% increase by 2031. To help you keep up with the pace of innovations, and boost your career, SAP launched a new guided, premium learning offering and announced an enhanced certification program.  

Sounds exciting? It is! So here is what you need to know to get started on your next learning adventure – and career advancement: 

You can pursue role-based certifications to get a more sustainable skillset 

The tech industry is transforming at a blistering pace and specialized cloud skills are very much in demand to support business transformation. Recognizing this need for always-up-to-date skills, SAP is transitioning to a role-based certification model and making continuous assessments a priority. A handful of role-based certifications are already available, the latest one for SAP S/4HANA Cloud implementations consultations was just recently launched. This new certification will focus on key skills that are applicable to multiple cloud solutions from SAP and can help your career through superior role-based competencies. Learn more in this blog post from my colleague Dieter.  

“The pace of change and the talent shortage call for a new approach to identifying future-focused skills and roles. Instead of focusing on traditional aspects like degrees, job histories and titles, professional competencies become more important,” says Andre Bechtold, senior vice president and head of solution and innovation experience at SAP. “By transitioning to role-based certifications that focus on core skills and competencies, the skillset of a learner becomes more valuable and gains sustainability and more relevance for longer periods of time.”  

To learn more about the new approach, turn to this blog post from my colleague and expert Raja.  

You can benefit from a new premium learning offering to reach your goals faster 

It might have a familiar name, but the enhanced SAP Learning Hub is our next level guided, premium learning offering. Available since January, the redesigned SAP Learning Hub provides everything anyone needs to learn, innovate, and achieve more with SAP software. 

A subscription to SAP Learning Hub provides access to a vast number of guided learning resources and management capabilities, such as: 
 

  • Expert-led live sessions covering deep dives and preparations to stay certified  
  • Access to hands-on practice systems and sandboxed SAP environments prefilled with data and exercises to experiment with solutions 
  • Four SAP Certification exam attempts per year and access to enablement and assessment to keep certifications valid 
  • Learning analytics and management capabilities 

With seamless access to both self-paced and guided learning resources, learners can follow learning journeys tailored for specific roles and skill levels to upskill in SAP solutions and topics in a self-paced way. With access to guided learning resources and certifications, the redesigned SAP Learning Hub everyone to become and remain certified. 

Available with two editions, anyone can subscribe to SAP Learning Hub on the SAP Store, or to SAP Learning Hub, partner edition (available for SAP PartnerEdge members) on the SAP Partner Portal.

As a learner with an SAP partner, you can get an exclusive experience on top 

Acknowledging the challenges and embracing the power of SAP’s partner ecosystem, SAP has also launched an enhanced partner experience on the SAP Learning site specifically tailored to the needs of partner learners. This new experience features curated SAP Learning Journeys, exclusive access to events and subject matter experts, plus the opportunity to earn valuable credentials. 

Whether you're opting for a role-based certification, a deep dive into the enhanced SAP Learning Hub, or all the above mentioned cool new offerings, you can start the future of learning right now – an investment in your SAP education today could provide a significant return for your future career. So, what’s stopping you now? Start learning anytime, anywhere. Secure your future by growing your skills with SAP!

entry.title: Prepare flexibly for certification as an SAP S/4HANA consultant
entry.content:
