entry.title: Learning Her Way Up: The Inspiring Growth Story of Anu in Norway
entry.content:
Roughly 4300 miles and 5 time zones away from home, Anu’s life suddenly turned into something very different. “In 2012, my husband got a job in Norway, so we moved here from India and started settling into our new life”, the 36-year-old recounts. “And my life has changed a lot”, she emphasizes. “I had no friends when I came here, I didn’t know any Norwegian.” But she soon realized that she would need to learn the language to get a job and truly connect with people. “Learning Norwegian was important for me to fit in, so I went to a local school to learn the basics.” Her perseverance paid off quickly - within one year, she was fluent enough to apply for jobs and secure a new position. 

And passed her SAP Certification exam after 4 weeks of studying, posted her badge on LinkedIn, and got immediately recognized by her manager.However, Anu felt like she was missing something. “I've had a job, but I've felt like my career wasn't moving forward”, she explains. “It wasn't because I wasn't working hard. It was because I had a lot of family responsibilities. Living in a different country, taking care of two young kids, and working full-time made things busy.” And then she realized: “My colleagues and even my spouse were focused on growing their careers – but I wasn’t.” That’s when Anu decided to act and immediately found the right path thanks to LinkedIn.

“It made me see how important it is to stay updated” 

In fact, it was one post from SAP Developer Advocat Thomas Jung that caught her eye. He was promoting SAP’s digital skills initiative, where people from underrepresented groups in tech can benefit from free digital learning and apply for a free certification exam voucher for an official SAP Certification. Since Anu started working with SAP solutions back in 2008 while she was getting her master's degree in software engineering, she already had SAP experience and thought this was the right path to follow.  

“When I was getting ready for certification, I found out about many new topics that I didn't deal with in my regular work. It made me see how important it is to stay updated, especially in a time when technology is growing really fast”, Anu recounts. “When we work on projects, we usually concentrate on one particular area. But it's always good to have an idea about what's going on around us.” Knowing about Anu’s perseverance, it comes as no surprise that she made use of every second she had to study for her exam – on the train or while the kids were asleep. And after 4 weeks of diving deep into the world of ABAP programming, she passed the exam on her first try. “It was the first thing I told my husband that day – I was really proud.” So proud even, that she immediately uploaded her certification badge to LinkedIn, where her manager saw her credentials and reacted himself.

Certification resulted in increased confidence in skills 

“Since obtaining the certification, I have seen positive changes in my professional journey”, Anu says. She believes that both her employer and customers have gained increased confidence in her abilities. “The knowledge and skills acquired through the program have proven invaluable in my day-to-day tasks. The certification has not only enhanced my proficiency in ABAP programming but has also opened doors to new opportunities within my current role.” 

It’s Anu’s understanding to always learn new things. “I want to teach my kids these values through my actions”, she explains. And again, it doesn’t come as a surprise that she already has a next goal in mind: “I want to complete the certification in ABAP cloud programming, and I have already started my preparations for the exam.” 

Start your own success story    

Did you feel inspired by Anu’s story? Then kick-start your own success story with SAP today. Benefit from tailored and self-paced learning opportunities that meet you when and where you learn best on SAP Learning site. Get certified to demonstrate your expertise and boost your career. We are looking forward to many more great success stories!

entry.title: Blog: Unlock New Opportunities – SAP's Industry Cloud Partner Certification
entry.content:
By Christian Hahn

In today's dynamic technology world, staying ahead of the curve is essential for businesses to thrive. SAP, a global leader in enterprise software solutions, is also a leader in enterprise innovation. With that in mind, we are introducing an exciting new offering for Industry Cloud partners to earn the designation “SAP-certified integration with GROW with SAP for their Industry Cloud applications built as SAP Business Technology Platform extensions.

This certification opens a world of possibilities for partners looking to demonstrate the technical integration and compatibility of their Industry Cloud applications with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. 
 

Discover the Path to Certification.
 

This partner service offering is an optional, yet highly valuable program designed to ensure that Industry Cloud applications and solutions listed on the SAP Store are seamlessly integrated and fully compatible with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. The certification process is rigorous and thorough, involving comprehensive testing and evaluation of the partner's solution to ensure it meets SAP's high standards of technical integration. You will be working with a dedicated SAP integration consultant throughout the process.  

Enjoy the benefits of providing a certified Industry Cloud partner solution, including:

  • Credibility and Trust: Achieving certification for your Industry Cloud solution is a powerful testament to a partner's commitment to quality and technical excellence. It instills trust in customers and prospects, assuring them that the certified solution is not only compatible but also optimized for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and following SAP best practices.
  • Market Visibility: SAP Store is a globally recognized marketplace for SAP solutions. With a certified solution, partners gain increased visibility, attracting potential customers looking for reliable and integrated Industry Cloud applications.
  • Competitive Advantage: Certification sets partners apart in a competitive market. It demonstrates a deep understanding of SAP technologies and a dedication to delivering exceptional solutions.
  • Access to SAP Ecosystem: Certified partners gain access to SAP's vast ecosystem of resources, support, and collaboration opportunities, opening doors to new growth avenues.
  • Customer Satisfaction: Certified solutions are more likely to meet customer expectations, leading to higher satisfaction rates, reduced support requests, and enhanced customer retention.
     

Sign up now.

Take advantage of this opportunity and sign up directly via the Partner Benefits Catalog, if your solution is an industry cloud extension built on SAP Business Technology Platform and integrated with SAP S/4HANA public edition.

You can also find additional information in our FAQ document and by visiting SAP's Integration and Certification Center. Please contact icc@sap.com with any questions you may have.

entry.title: Register now: SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Cloud – Partner Certification Academies
entry.content:
• In Jan 2024, SAP Learning has introduced new changes to SAP Learning Journeys, SAP Certification Exams and the Stay Current cycle.  To support our partner ecosystem, with these new changes for aspiring and existing consultants with Certifications, we have launched a new edition of SAP Partner Certification Academies for SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition.
  • The SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Cloud – Partner Certification Academies is meant for aspiring LOB functional consultants and project managers, that are looking to get certified on SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition – Role Based & LoB Certifications.
  • The academies provide expert guidance, allowing learners to build familiarity & understand certification guidance across various topics, covered in the SAP Learning Journeys, which reduces the time spent in the self-paced consumption of LJs.  The Academies provide learners, an overview of key concepts, tips & tricks to optimally consume the SAP Learning Journeys while preparing them for their SAP Certification exam.

Benefits of this Program:

  • Our offering improves your chances of passing the SAP Certification Exam.
  • Our offering enhances and accelerates your learning path in effectively progressing through an SAP Learning Journey to prepare for an SAP Certification Exam.
  • Key Points:
  • Participation in the Certification Academies are free of charge, as always. Certification hub subscriptions and LH subscriptions, however remain, the responsibility of the individual consultant/ partner.
  • The Academies are based on the new version of Learning Journeys and Certification Exams released as of Jan 24, 2024. This is every partner’s best opportunity, to not lose any time and get started on their Certification efforts.
  • The Academies run in both EMEA / APJ and NA/ EMEA time zones, therefore we should encourage all-round participation from our partners.  

Target: Audience

 

  • SAP S/4HANA - LoB Consultants looking to UPSKILL to (or) REFRESH their SAP S/4HANA Cloud LoB fundamentals.
  • SAP S/4HANA - LoB Consultants looking to get SAP S/4HANA Cloud (Public Cloud) Certified.

Fee
This is a free of charge offering. However, it is mandatory that the Partner has access to a full subscription of SAP Learning Hub, to access all the content of the SAP Learning Journeys for SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition

Date of the Academies:

  • 11th March 2024 to 14th March 2024.

Registration Link: 

  • Link to Register  

Please reach out to sapna.subramaniam@sap.com in case of any questions on this offering!

I welcome your questions and looking forward to having you participate in our Academies.
